'''Gabals''' were a large [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] native to the [[Zirfan glacier]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]].<ref name="CE" /> Native Rhinnalians hunted wild gabals in the frigid borderland of the Zirfan glacier for their thick fur<ref name="CC" /> and as a source of food.<ref name="CE" /> Gabal wool was later sold or used by native Rhinnalians to create hand-woven, colorful, patterned garments.<ref name="CC" />
